title: Circle Of Life
lines: From the [G]day we arrive on the pl[Am]anet
And bli[D]nking, step into the s[G]un
There's m[Em]ore to be seen than can e[Am]ver be seen
More to d[F]o than can ever be d[D]one
[G]Some say eat or be e[Am]aten
Some say[D] live and let l[G]ive
But [Em]all are agreed as they [Am]join the stampede
You should [F]never take more than you g[D]ive
In the circle of l[G]ife
It's the wheel of f[F]ortune
It's the leap of f[C]aith
It's the band of h[D]ope
Till we find our [G]place [E]
On the path unw[Am]inding [Fm]
In the c[G]ircle,[D] the circle of l[C]ife [G]

And [D]some of us soar to the st[G]ars

But the S[Em]un rolling high through the s[Am]apphire sky
